mainEntity.name: Do Google AI Overviews cite BigLaw firms in Los Angeles for consumer cases?
mainEntity.text: Do Google AI Overviews cite BigLaw firms in Los Angeles for consumer cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rarely; LA AI Overviews cite consumer-facing firms with SEO/review strength over BigLaw, which dominates directories but not high-intent synthesis.

suggestedAnswer.text: BigLaw appears in complex queries; consumer cases like PI favor marketing pros. LA firms bridge gap with hybrid content strategies.

name: BigLaw in LA Consumer AI Overviews
